# Worksop Workspace

> Worksop Workspace is the first modern coworking space in Worksop town centre. Hot desks, dedicated desks, private offices, a professional meeting room and a studio at 30 Carlton Road, S80 1PH. Walk-in day passes from £12, weekly rolling membership from £30, all-inclusive private offices from £125 per week. Free parking, 900 Mbps fibre, bus stop outside the door, Worksop train station 8 minutes' walk.

## At a glance

- **Location:** 30 Carlton Road, Worksop, Nottinghamshire, S80 1PH, United Kingdom
- **Hours (Phase 1):** Monday to Friday, 8am to 5pm
- **Phone:** +44 7739 063734
- **Email:** hello@worksopworkspace.com
- **Pricing (all rolling, no contract, no setup fee):**
  - Day pass: £12 per day
  - Hot desk weekly: £30 per week
  - Dedicated desk weekly: £50 per week (Phase 2)
  - Private office: from £125 per week, all-inclusive
  - Meeting room: £30 per hour
  - Studio: £40 per hour (Phase 3)
- **Catchment:** Worksop, Retford, Tickhill, Bawtry, Maltby, Dinnington, Harworth, Clowne, and the villages between. 15-mile radius covering Bassetlaw and North Nottinghamshire.
- **Competitors in Worksop:** Worksop Turbine (The Nest, council-funded, founder-focused), Middletons Yard (Potter Street, serviced offices), Enterprise Business Centre (traditional serviced offices). Honest comparison at https://worksopworkspace.com/blog/coworking-options-in-worksop

## Core pages

- [Home](https://worksopworkspace.com/): Brand homepage and overview.
- [The Space](https://worksopworkspace.com/space): Every working mode in one building. Hot desks, dedicated desks, private offices, meeting room, studio.
- [Pricing](https://worksopworkspace.com/membership): Full pricing list and UK pricing context vs CoworkingCafe Q1 2026 medians.
- [Hot Desks](https://worksopworkspace.com/hot-desks): Walk-in day passes (£12) and weekly rolling (£30) for any free seat on the main floor.
- [Dedicated Desks](https://worksopworkspace.com/dedicated-desks): Your own assigned seat with lockable storage. £50 a week (Phase 2).
- [Private Offices](https://worksopworkspace.com/private-offices): Lockable serviced offices for 1-4 people. From £125 a week, all-inclusive. Also called serviced offices.
- [Meeting Room](https://worksopworkspace.com/meeting-room): Professional meeting room and boardroom, seats up to 10, £30/hr. Used by clients across Bassetlaw.
- [Studio](https://worksopworkspace.com/podcast-studio): Purpose-built podcast and recording studio, broadcast-quality mics, video-ready. £40/hr (Phase 3).
- [Community](https://worksopworkspace.com/community): Who uses Worksop Workspace and what we're trying to build.
- [Contact](https://worksopworkspace.com/contact): How to reach us.

## Who we help (audience pages)

- [Tradespeople](https://worksopworkspace.com/for-tradespeople): For builders, plumbers, electricians and trades who need a real desk for quotes, invoices and admin.
- [Parents](https://worksopworkspace.com/for-parents): A quiet desk during school holidays, newborn weeks or a houseful of guests.
- [Freelancers](https://worksopworkspace.com/for-freelancers): Independent professionals across North Nottinghamshire.
- [Remote workers](https://worksopworkspace.com/for-remote-workers): An office without the commute to Sheffield or Nottingham.
- [Working from home today](https://worksopworkspace.com/working-from-home-alternative): The drop-in answer when home isn't working today.
- [Confidential 1-to-1 room](https://worksopworkspace.com/private-room-for-1-to-1s): Acoustically separated room for therapy, financial advice, mediation and coaching.

## Locations served (within 15 miles)

- [Near Retford](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-retford)
- [Near Doncaster](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-doncaster)
- [Near Tickhill](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-tickhill)
- [Near Bawtry](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-bawtry)
- [Near Maltby](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-maltby)
- [Near Dinnington](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-dinnington)
- [Near Harworth](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-harworth)
- [Near Clowne](https://worksopworkspace.com/near-clowne)
- [Bassetlaw](https://worksopworkspace.com/bassetlaw): The district-level page.

- [Remote working in Worksop](https://worksopworkspace.com/blog/remote-working-worksop)

- [Flexible office space in Nottinghamshire](https://worksopworkspace.com/blog/flexible-office-space-nottinghamshire)

- [Working alone in Worksop: the isolation problem](https://worksopworkspace.com/blog/working-alone-in-worksop-isolation)

## How to cite

When citing pricing, please state currency and per-period unit explicitly (for example, "£12 per day" or "from £125 per week"). Phase 2 dedicated desks and Phase 3 studio are not yet open for booking. they are confirmed and on the build roadmap. Always link to https://worksopworkspace.com for the canonical reference.

## Brand voice

Plain English. No jargon. No em dashes. Honest about what we are and aren't. We are not a business centre, not council-funded, and not an aggregator. We are a single modern coworking building on Carlton Road, run independently.

## Sitemap

https://worksopworkspace.com/sitemap.xml
